notes: Installed it normally. Just booted it up and game went through the normal setup doohickies of direct x and nvidia stuff.  Then played. Went through the training and 1st mission of the campaign with no hickups. Save and load work as expected. Switching graphics modes to 1080p worked flawlessly. Audio worked. In short: another game for platinum.
title: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon Advanced Warfighter® 2

notes:
Installed it normally. Just booted it up and game went through the normal setup doohickies of direct x and nvidia stuff. Then played. Went through the training and 1st mission of the campaign with no hickups. Save and load work as expected. Switching graphics modes to 1080p worked flawlessly. Audio worked. Then after a couple of missions the game started crashing. Hard crashes to the desktop. Seems like a memory allocation problem in directx. Just reloaded the game and went on my merry way. 
Finished the game (11 hours) with some crashes. But as long as you save often (you should anyway in this game) it wasn't much of a problem. So enjoyed it but no platinum after more hours of play.
title: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon Advanced Warfighter® 2
